title: Post template: learned, built, impact
excerpt: A reusable structure for writing high-signal engineering posts that recruiters can skim in under a minute.
recruiterSignal: Frames technical work in business terms
Makes projects easy to evaluate quickly
summary: This template sets a clear structure for future posts so each one shows scope, technical depth, and outcome without turning into a diary entry.

sections.heading: Recommended structure
bullets: What I built or worked on
What I learned or would improve next
Recruiter takeaway: what this says about how I work

sections.heading: Keep it high signal
content: The best posts are specific. Name the stack, the tradeoffs, the constraints, and the outcome. Avoid generic motivational writing.
A recruiter or hiring manager should be able to skim the post and understand the scope, ownership, and engineering judgment involved.
